title: Titanic returns, this time in the sky: 950 drones recreate the iconic liner in a stunning show over UK’s Belfast
summary_full: A spectacular drone show lit up Belfast's night sky, forming the outline of the historic RMS Titanic.  Around 950 drones created the glowing silhouette over Belfast Harbour.  The event marked the anniversary of Titanic's departure from the city's shipyards in 1912.  This modern tribute blended history and technology, reminding viewers of the ship's enduring legacy.
